# Design Disaster - Food Delivery App Setup

This workspace contains a React + Vite application that intentionally violates UI/UX principles for educational purposes.

## Project Details

- **Type**: React + Vite
- **Purpose**: Design Disaster Competition - Demonstrate UX flaws
- **Main Features**: Food delivery platform with intentional design disasters

## Key Design Flaws Implemented

✗ Confusing menu layouts with overlapping elements
✗ Hidden checkout options - only visible on hover
✗ Misleading discounts with complex disclaimers
✗ Difficult order tracking with conflicting information
✗ Poor navigation with uneven sizing
✗ Cluttered interface with clashing colors
✗ Uneven font sizes throughout
✗ Misleading color coding (wrong colors for ratings)
✗ Non-intuitive interactive elements
✗ Bad contrast and readability

## Development

- Install dependencies: \`npm install\`
- Start dev server: \`npm run dev\`
- Build project: \`npm run build\`

All project files are located in \`src/\` directory with component structure.
